description: As a catastrophe modeler for a reinsurance firm, verify the climatological boundary conditions (SST and SLP) for the Western North Pacific typhoon basin catastrophe model for August. Using Panoply and the datasets in ~/PanoplyData/ (sst.ltm.1991-2020.nc and slp.mon.ltm.nc), complete the analysis requested in ~/Desktop/cat_model_calibration_request.txt. Export the required plots and compile the model calibration report, applying domain knowledge of tropical cyclogenesis thresholds and monsoonal troughs.
